title: rumohra hasseltii
intro: Rumohra hasseltii, also known as the Hasselt's fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Polypodiaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Rumohra hasseltii include reducing fever, alleviating pain and inflammation, and promoting wound healing. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and has been used in traditional medicine in various parts of the world, particularly in Asia and Africa.
